Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWORDEMPRODUCAO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &PossuiModuloIND_SETOR = RetornaEmpresaModulo.Udp(&Context.EmpCod, ModuloSistema.IND_SETOR) tbClassificacaoProducao.Visible = (&PossuiModuloIND_SETOR = 'S') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UnnamedTable4.Width = 150 UnnamedTable3.Width = 150 UnnamedTable2.Width = 150 Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = 30 &GrpAcoesData = new() &GrpAcoesDataItem = new() &GrpAcoesDataItem.Title = 'Qtd.Fabricar' &GrpAcoesDataItem.EventKey = !'QtdFabricar' &GrpAcoesDataItem.IsDivider = False &GrpAcoesData.Add(&GrpAcoesDataItem) &GrpAcoesDataItem = new() &GrpAcoesDataItem.Title = 'Cal.Mínimo' &GrpAcoesDataItem.EventKey = !'CalculoMinimo' &GrpAcoesDataItem.IsDivider = False &GrpAcoesData.Add(&GrpAcoesDataItem) &GrpAcoesDataItem = new() &GrpAcoesDataItem.Title = 'Exportar Excel' &GrpAcoesDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &GrpAcoesDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &GrpAcoesDataItem.IsDivider = False &GrpAcoesData.Add(&GrpAcoesDataItem) &ProTipDef = nullvalue(&ProTipDef) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Ordem de Produção por Setor' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Código Produto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Descrição Produto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Ordem Prioridade') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Exedente Producao') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Maior Qtd. Produção') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Menor Qtd. Estoque') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Menor Dias Estoque') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Sugestão Produção') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Quantidade Vendida') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'ABC.R') &OrderedBy.AddItem(11, 'ABC.Q') &OrderedBy.AddItem(12, 'Prioridade') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ // &auxGrupHie = &GrupHie.Trim()+'.' &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod EndEvent Event Refresh &EstFab.Enabled = 1 &SalvaLinha.Enabled = 1 If not &GrupHie.IsEmpty() &auxGrupHie = &GrupHie.Trim()+'.' Else &auxGrupHie.SetEmpty() EndIf do 'TotalFabricar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWOrdemProducaoColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWOrdemProducaoColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf ProRef.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &gridProNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible EstABC_Ren.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible EstABC_Qtd.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible &UltEstQtd.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &EstUltOrd.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible &gridEstPrd_Formatado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible &gridEstCom_Formatado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &gridEstQtd_Formatado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible &gridEstVen_Formatado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible &gridEstSdo_Formatado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible &gridEstMinDia.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible &gridEstMinVen.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible &gridEstMin_Formatado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(14).IsVisible &gridEstFabMin_Formatado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(15).IsVisible &gridEstSug_Formatado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(16).IsVisible &EstFab.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(17).IsVisible &EstDias.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(18).IsVisible EstPrio.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(19).IsVisible ProSetCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(20).IsVisible &SalvaLinha.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(21).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ // &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod // &FilCod = &Context.FilCod // msg('Dados Atualizado Com Sucesso!') EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &ProVlrCus = ProVlrCus &EstFab = EstFab &EstDias = EstDias if EstSdo < 0 &gridEstSdo_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(220,0,0) Else &gridEstSdo_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF &gridEstQtd_Formatado.LinkTarget = '_blank' &gridEstQtd_Formatado.Link = wpConsultaEstoque.Link(ProCod) UltimaDataQuantidadeProducao.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, 0, serverdate(), ProCod, ProGraCod, &UltEstQtd, &EstUltOrd, &AuxGrupHie, &ProSetCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DetailWebComponent = !'' &gridProNom = ProNom &gridEstPrd_Formatado = EstPrd_Formatado &gridEstCom_Formatado = EstCom_Formatado &gridEstQtd_Formatado = EstQtd_Formatado &gridEstVen_Formatado = EstVen_Formatado &gridEstSdo_Formatado = EstSdo_Formatado &gridEstMinDia = EstMinDia &gridEstMinVen = EstMinVen &gridEstMin_Formatado = EstMin_Formatado &gridEstFabMin_Formatado = EstFabMin_Formatado &gridEstSug_Formatado = EstSug_Formatado /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &gridProNom.Link = VerProduto.Link('DashBoard', EmpCod, ProCod) &gridProNom.LinkTarget = '_blank' &gridEstSug_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) &gridEstFabMin_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) if EstSug_FORMULA > 0 If EstSug_FORMULA > EstFabMin &gridEstSug_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,220) Else &gridEstSug_Formatado.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,220) EndIF EndIF EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWOrdemProducaoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState.Call(!'WWOrdemProducaoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh EndIf EndEvent Event 'DoGerarOrdemProducao' Do Case Case &ProTipDef.Trim().IsEmpty() or &ProSetCod.IsEmpty() Msg('ATENÇÃO! Só é possível gerar a ordem por definição do produto e setor, então esses filtros não podem estar vazios ou selecionada TODAS.') OtherWise CarregaSdtProducao.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &FilCod, &ProSetCod, &ProTipDef, &GrupHie, &OrderedBy, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao, &ProClsPrdCod, &sdtOrdemProducao) GravaOrdemProducao.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &FilCod, &GrupHie, &ProSetCod, &ProClsPrdCod, &sdtOrdemProducao, TipoOrdem.OrdemProducao, &OrdCod) wpConfirmaOrdem.Popup(&FilCod, &OrdCod, &OrderedBy) Refresh EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExedente' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpExcedenteProducao.PopUp(&ProSetCod, &GrupHie, &ProTipDef, &ProClsPrdCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoEmProducao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpProdutosEmProducao.PopUp() Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_GrpAcoes.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_GrpAcoes.ActiveEventKey = !'QtdFabricar' Do 'Do QtdFabricar' Case ddo_GrpAcoes.ActiveEventKey = !'CalculoMinimo' Do 'Do CalculoMinimo' Case ddo_GrpAcoes.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = wcDadosMinimo.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProRef", '', !'Ref.Cód.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridProNom", '', !'Produto Descrição', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"EstABC_Ren", '', !'ABC.R', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"EstABC_Qtd", '', !'ABC.Q', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&UltEstQtd", '', !'Ult.Qtd', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&EstUltOrd", '', !'Ult.Ord.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstPrd_Formatado", '', !'Produção', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstCom_Formatado", '', !'Compras', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstQtd_Formatado", '', !'Estoque', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstVen_Formatado", '', !'Vendas', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstSdo_Formatado", '', !'Saldo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstMinDia", '', !'D.I.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstMinVen", '', !'Vendido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstMin_Formatado", '', !'Mínimo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstFabMin_Formatado", '', !'Fab.Mín.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridEstSug_Formatado", '', !'Sugestão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&EstFab", '', !'Fabricar', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&EstDias", '', !'D.E.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"EstPrio", '', !'Prioridade', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProSetCod", '', !'Setor', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&SalvaLinha", '', !'', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWOrdemProducaoColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do QtdFabricar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ QuantidadeFabricar.PopUp(&ProSetCod, &GrupHie, &IsRefresh) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CalculoMinimo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpEstoqueMinimo.PopUp() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROREF" &ProRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSETCOD" &ProSetCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROCLSPRDCOD" &ProClsPrdCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"GRUPHIE" &GrupHie.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"AUXGRUPHIE" &AuxGrupHie.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROTIPDEF" &ProTipDef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRACOD" &ProGraCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROREF", "", not &ProRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSETCOD", "", not &ProSetCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSetCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROCLSPRDCOD", "", not &ProClsPrdCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProClsPrdCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"GRUPHIE", "", not &GrupHie.IsEmpty(), 0, &GrupHie, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"AUXGRUPHIE", "", not &AuxGrupHie.IsEmpty(), 0, &AuxGrupHie, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROTIPDEF", "", not &ProTipDef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProTipDef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRACOD", "", not &ProGraCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"OrdemProducao" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWOrdemProducao.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &EstFab.IsValid GravarFabricar.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &EstFab, &EstDias) do 'TotalFabricar' EndEvent Sub 'TotalFabricar' RetornaQtdFabricarSugestao.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &FilCod, &ProSetCod, &ProTipDef, &GrupHie, &QtdTotFabricar, &QtdTotSugestao, &QtdTotProducao) EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
